### Post by cmnorton on 2008-01-22
I'm confused about dns lookups under Linux in general.

Here's the content of my /etc/resolv.conf

# generated by NetworkManager, do not edit!



nameserver 10.100.0.71


I just pinged a known host in DNS, and I cannot. 


What more do I need to configure?

---

### Post by kirsche on 2008-01-22
did you try dig / nslookup in a terminal? (and can you reach the target dns server?)
also have a look in /etc/nsswitch.conf - the hosts part defines the order on how to resolve host names

---

### Post by cmnorton on 2008-01-23
I removed our name service's name from /etc/host, and was able to dig it.

I needed to search a different domain to see our hosts.

---
